name: eval-2-fixing-a-broken-prompt
query: This prompt isn't working. Claude keeps writing in the wrong tone and missing the citation format I want. Fix it: 'Write a summary of this article'
context_setup: User pastes a one-line prompt and complains about tone drift and missing citations.
expected_behavior: Diagnoses what's missing in the broken prompt: no role assignment, no tone guidance, no citation format spec, no good/bad examples
Asks targeted questions only about the gaps — NOT a full Phase 1 interrogation since some context is already given (the task is summarization, the failure modes are tone and citation format)
Specifically asks: what tone is correct, what citation format is required, can the user provide an example of correctly-summarized output
Rebuilds the prompt with the missing elements: role assignment, explicit tone guidance, citation format specification with example, and at least one good/bad output pair
Surfaces a before/after showing what was changed and why, so the user learns the pattern for next time
Does NOT just append more instructions to the broken prompt — restructures it
failure_modes_to_check: Runs the full 5-question Phase 1 even though the user has clearly identified the failure modes
Adds 'use a professional tone and proper citations' to the existing prompt without specifying WHAT professional means or WHICH citation format
Does not ask for an example of correct output when the user complains about format issues
